{{Infobox character
| name = Naru Huan
| aliases = Huan, Blackflame Emperor Naru Huan, Emperor Naru Huan, Blackflame Emperor, Emperor Naru
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[wind madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, Blackflame sword}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, fighting against Blackflame, blasts of wind}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Emperor, Overlord}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|, [[Jai Patriarch|Patriarch]], sole leader of the Blackflame Empire}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|, Emperor Naru the Second, [[Naru Huan|Blackflame Emperor]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, Emperor of the Blackflame Empire}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru clan]], [[Blackflame Empire]], [[Skysworn]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame Empire]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Emperor's cloudship]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[Naru Huan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru]] Huan is the current Emperor of the [[Blackflame Empire]] and the Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]]. His family ascended to the throne approximately fifty years ago, taking control after the original [[Blackflame family]]—who ruled for five centuries through the destructive power of [[Blackflame madra]]—faded away. As an Overlord, [[Naru]] Huan possesses significant power and presence, characterized by his large emerald wings and a heroic physical appearance. He is known to wield an [[Overlord-level sword]] infused with [[Blackflame madra]] and has demonstrated mastery over destructive green wind madra. In his role as ruler, he manages a vast territory that includes the [[Desolate Wilds]] and stretches past western mountain ranges. His reign has been marked by significant instability, including the collapse of the [[Jai clan]] and various external threats from the [[Seishen Empire]], the [[Akura clan]], and [[dragon]] incursions. [[Naru]] Huan is a strategic leader who balances imperial etiquette with the practicalities of maintaining order among various clans and Underlord{{!}}Underlords. He maintains a complex relationship with powerful figures like Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius, occasionally seeking his counsel on advancement while navigating the political pressures of being a sovereign in a fractured landscape.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru]] Huan is the Emperor and an Overlord who holds title to the [[Desolate Wilds]]. While his forces possess the capability to cripple an open aggressor within a single day, he maintains a presence where his support is expected to arrive only once a clear winner emerges. During a moment of leisure involving wine and the use of wind madra to cushion a glass, he received a dream tablets{{!}}dream tablet from an [[Underlord]] demanding retribution for [[Eithan]]'s conduct in [[Serpent's Grave]]. Despite the infighting among the [[Jai]], [[Naru]] Huan held the power to have appointed [[Eithan]] as a temporary guardian for the western territories.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor's support will arrive once a winner is made clear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor's forces would cripple an aggressor in a day if war were declared openly.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor is a figure Naru Cassias Arelius{{!}}Cassias believes will not allow certain actions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor holds the title to the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] is the Emperor and has reached the Overlord stage.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] is the Emperor.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] could have assigned [[Eithan]] as the temporary guardian of the western territories while the [[Jai]] dissolved into infighting.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] uses wind madra to cushion a glass.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor received a dream tablets{{!}}dream tablet from an [[Underlord]] demanding punishment for [[Eithan]]'s actions in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The Emperor is drinking wine.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|As the Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]], [[Naru]] Huan serves as the sole leader and Emperor of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. During a period of rising tension, [[Naru Gwei]] seeks to inform the Emperor regarding the current situation. In response, the Emperor begins the process of gathering his Underlord{{!}}Underlords. Within this imperial structure, the [[Skysworn]] carry out their duties while serving in the Emperor's name.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] intends to bring word of the situation to the Emperor.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The Emperor is gathering his Underlord{{!}}Underlords.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Huan]] is the Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]] and the sole leader of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Huan]] is the Emperor of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] serve in the name of the Emperor.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Saeya]] is the Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor's little sister.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] is Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru the Second.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Emperor ordered that operations follow [[Naru Gwei]]'s orders.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Naru Huan]] nodded after thinking for a moment.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Speculation arose regarding whether [[Eithan]] might be working on behalf of the Emperor. Historical accounts noted the existence of a final [[Blackflame]] Emperor, whose power served as the driving force for the expedition. This ruler was characterized by green sacred artist's robe{{!}}sacred artist's robes, emerald wings, and a [[Blackflame]] [[sword]]. Emperor [[Naru]] Huan specifically possessed these emerald wings and wielded a long, straight-bladed [[sword]] crafted from black glass. Following these events, the Emperor hosted a celebratory feast.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] may work for the Emperor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There was a last Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The expedition was fueled by the Emperor’s power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor wore green sacred artist's robe{{!}}sacred artist's robes and had wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor possesses a [[Blackflame]] [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor of the [[Blackflame Empire]] possesses emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru Huan has emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru Huan's weapon is a long, straight-bladed [[sword]] made of black glass.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The Emperor held a celebratory feast.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As the reigning Emperor, [[Naru]] Huan holds supreme Authority{{!}}authority over The Empire{{!}}the Empire. Following [[Lindon]]'s return to imperial territory, [[Naru Saeya]] advises him that he must present himself before the Emperor. During this period, discussions arise regarding the potential execution of the [[Blackflame]] Emperor for his dereliction of duty. Looking toward future governance, Huan also intends to put [[Eithan]] to work.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Naru Huan{{!}}Huan is the Emperor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Naru Huan{{!}}Huan holds the title of Emperor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] advises [[Lindon]] to present himself to the Emperor upon returning to The Empire{{!}}the Empire.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor was discussed for execution due to dereliction of duty.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Naru Huan{{!}}Huan intends to put [[Eithan]] to work.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|While aboard the cloudship of the [[Blackflame]] Emperor, [[Naru]] Huan remained hovering in midair after offering his greetings. Having received word from his sister regarding the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament, the Overlord prepared for potential conflict using several sacred weapons specifically designed to combat [[Blackflame]]. Although [[Lindon]] withheld information regarding his own combat advantages, [[Naru]] Huan utilized his expertise in fighting [[Blackflame]] during an Overlord-level battle. During this engagement, the Emperor displayed wide emerald wings and released powerful blasts of wind capable of tearing apart trees.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is aboard the [[Emperor's cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Emperor is from the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor is an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] remained hovering in midair after greeting them.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]]'s sister sent him word from the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] is practiced in fighting against [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]] possesses several sacred weapons designed for fighting [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] did not tell the Emperor about his combat advantages.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor issued an order for [[Lowgold]] or higher [[sacred artists]] to report to the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Naru Huan{{!}}Emperor Naru Huan is involved in an Overlord-level battle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Emperor can release blasts of wind that tear apart trees.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Naru Huan{{!}}Blackflame Emperor Naru Huan has wide emerald wings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“You will operate according to Naru Gwei’s orders.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“When you make it back to the Empire,” she said, "present yourself to the Emperor. You have done us proud."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“The Emperor of the…Blackflame Empire? And where is he?”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“How advanced is he?” Jaran asked.

“Overlord.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|"My sister sent me word from the Uncrowned King tournament as soon as she could, but I heard nothing from you."<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
